creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Steve,

as said in the relnotes for RELEASE.2021-08-25T00-41-18Z:
=====
It is advised that anyone upgrading from any release from 2020 should directly upgrade to RELEASE.2021-06-07T21-40-51Z - (or any release prior to RELEASE.2021-05-11T23-27-41Z so that you can then directly upgrade to RELEASE.2021-06-07T21-40-51Z or later).
=====

What do you think about this? Why aren't you note about this in the commit?
Maybe should it place a note to pkg-message?
